Name: insert_departments
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::text AS "description", $2::uuid AS "id", $3::text AS "name" UNION ALL SELECT $4::text AS "description", $5::uuid AS "id", $6::text AS "name" UNION ALL SELECT $7::text AS "description", $8::uuid AS "id", $9::text AS "name") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("description", "id", "name") SELECT check_mutation_result."description", check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."name" FROM check_mutation_result RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
